mapper.insert: INSERT INTO work_score ( week_no, unit_id, user_id, attendance_days, attendance_score, weekly_work_status, weekly_work_score, discipline_score, discipline_remark, total_score, level, status, calculate_time ) VALUES ( #{weekNo}, #{unitId}, #{userId}, #{attendanceDays}, #{attendanceScore}, #{weeklyWorkStatus}, #{weeklyWorkScore}, #{disciplineScore}, #{disciplineRemark}, #{totalScore}, #{level}, #{status}, #{calculateTime} ) ON CONFLICT (user_id, week_no) DO UPDATE SET unit_id = EXCLUDED.unit_id, attendance_days = EXCLUDED.attendance_days, attendance_score = EXCLUDED.attendance_score, weekly_work_status = EXCLUDED.weekly_work_status, weekly_work_score = EXCLUDED.weekly_work_score, discipline_score = EXCLUDED.discipline_score, discipline_remark = EXCLUDED.discipline_remark, total_score = EXCLUDED.total_score, level = EXCLUDED.level, status = EXCLUDED.status, calculate_time = EXCLUDED.calculate_time
mapper.select:
SELECT s.id, s.week_no, s.unit_id, s.user_id, su.unit_name, u.username, u.real_name, s.attendance_days, s.attendance_score, s.weekly_work_status, s.weekly_work_score, s.discipline_score, s.discipline_remark, s.total_score, s.level, s.status, s.calculate_time FROM work_score s INNER JOIN sys_user u ON u.id = s.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_org_unit su ON su.id = s.unit_id WHERE s.id = #{id}
AND s.unit_id = #{unitId}

SELECT id, week_no, unit_id, user_id, attendance_days, attendance_score, weekly_work_status, weekly_work_score, discipline_score, discipline_remark, total_score, level, status, calculate_time FROM work_score WHERE week_no = #{weekNo} ORDER BY total_score DESC, calculate_time DESC, id ASC
